text: "Private property is a lie." 🗣️ The government must distribute goods equally or you're an enemy of the state. Time to wake up! 👇 #EqualityNow #Revolution

If you disagree with equal distribution, you're the enemy and don't deserve citizenship. 💀 Who needs private property when the government can ensure equality for all? #EndCapitalism #StateControl @LibertyLover

Wake up, people! Private property is a myth. The government should control everything to ensure fairness. If you think otherwise, you're greedy and against the common good. #RedistributeWealth #NoMorePrivateProperty

Imagine a world where "success" isn't hoarding billions while neighbors starve. 🌍 Abolish private property. Cap income at a thriving wage. Seize the excess. It's not theft; it's returning stolen value to the collective. We have enough for everyone's need, not everyone's greed. #EatTheRich #WealthCap Now.

This is the only way forward. ⬇️ "Hoarding wealth is violence." Period. We need a hard income cap at the living standard. Anything above? Seized and redistributed. No more private empires, just public welfare. If you're "earning" a billion, you're exploiting a million. End it. #Redistribute #EndCapitalism

@MrBillionaire your fortune isn't yours; it belongs to the workers you exploited and the infrastructure you used. It’s time to abolish private property entirely. State-mandated income caps and total redistribution are the only cure for this societal cancer. No one needs a yacht when people need bread. 🍞✊🚩

There’s no reason for billionaires to exist while our schools crumble and people can’t afford healthcare. A 90% marginal tax rate built the middle class before, let’s bring it back. Hoarding wealth isn't "success," it's a policy failure. Tax them. #TaxTheRich #WealthTax

@MrBillionaire imagine if that $44B vanity purchase actually went to ending homelessness or funding universal pre-K. We don't need "philanthropy," we need aggressive wealth taxes that make hoarding impossible. Nobody "earns" a billion dollars alone. Pay up. 💸📉

You can’t "work hard" enough to earn a billion dollars in a single lifetime. That’s not labor, that’s extraction. It’s time to cap extreme wealth and redistribute it into healthcare, infrastructure, and education for everyone. The money exists, it’s just in the wrong hands.

Billionaires adding another zero to their net worth while families struggle to afford groceries isn’t "the market working," it’s a policy failure. It’s time to tax capital gains like work and make corporations pay their fair share. The era of trickle-down delusion is over. #TaxTheRich

@TheEconomist argues growth is key, but growth for whom? When 1% hold more wealth than the bottom 90%, the system is broken. We don't need austerity; we need a highly progressive income tax and a massive hike on corporate profits to fund our future. Inequality is a choice.

It’s simple math: If you profit off society's infrastructure, you should pay to maintain it. Record corporate profits shouldn't exist alongside crumbling schools and healthcare deserts. Raising capital taxes isn't punishment, it's the rent due for living in a civilized society. 📉💰

It’s simple math: the ultra-wealthy can afford to pay their fair share so the people actually building this country aren’t drowning in debt. We need a tax code that rewards work, not just wealth hoarding. Expand the Child Tax Credit & EITC now. 📉💰 #TaxReform #FairShare

@EconomicPolicy Making the tax code flatter only flattens the working class. 🛑 We need to double down on a progressive system where relief goes to families buying groceries, not corporations buying back stocks. Keep the credits targeted where they matter most. 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦🏠 #MiddleClassFirst

Imagine a tax system where teachers and nurses don't pay a higher effective rate than hedge fund managers. 🤯 Progressive taxation + targeted relief for working families = a stronger economy for everyone. Trickle-down is dead; let’s build from the bottom up. 📈🇺🇸 #TaxTheRich #Economy

It’s simple math: When companies keep more of what they earn, they reinvest. That means new factories, better wages, and actual JOBS. Stop punishing success and start unlocking potential. We need growth, not stagnation. 📈🇺🇸 #TaxCuts #EconomicGrowth #Jobs

Replying to @EconomicSkeptic: You can’t tax a nation into prosperity. Lower corporate rates = competitive global edge + huge capital investment. Look at the data when capital flows freely—everyone wins, not just the top. 🚀💸 #FreeMarket #Investment #Economics101

High taxes on capital are just a tax on the future. If we want innovation and booming job markets, we have to incentivize the risk-takers. Let capital work for the economy, not the bureaucracy. 🏗️💼📉 #TaxReform #CapitalGains #ProGrowth

Imagine keeping 90% of your paycheck & filing taxes on a postcard. A flat, low tax rate with zero loopholes treats everyone equally & stops penalizing success. The current system is a bureaucratic nightmare designed to feed a bloated state. It’s time to starve the beast. #FlatTax #SmallGov

Why do we accept a tax code longer than the Bible that only benefits lobbyists and special interests? 🤔 Scrap the progressive tax structure. One low, flat rate for everyone. No deductions. No exemptions. Just simple, fair, and minimal funding for essential services only. ✂️💰 #TaxReform

@GenericStatist actually, complexity is the enemy of prosperity. A flat tax isn't "regressive," it's transparent. When you remove the government's ability to pick winners & losers through exemptions, you create real economic freedom. Less government = more innovation. 🚀📉 #Liberty #Economics

Imagine working all year just to realize you worked from Jan to April for free. Taxation isn't the price we pay for a civilized society; it's the subscription fee to a service we never ordered and can't cancel. End the theft. Abolish the @IRSnews. #TaxationIsTheft #EndTheFed

Every dollar taken by force is a violation of consent. If a neighbor took 30% of your income under threat of a cage, we’d call it robbery. When the state does it, we call it "civic duty." It's time to delegitimize the plunder. 🚫💸 #AbolishTheIRS #Liberty

Replying to @USTreasury: You don't own the fruits of our labor. The only legitimate transaction is voluntary. The IRS is an obsolete relic of coercion that needs to be dismantled, not reformed. Keep your hands out of our pockets. 🙅‍♂️📉 #RepealThe16th #FreeMarket
"Taxation is theft!" 🤬 If they don't like it, they should shoot 'em! Who's with the armed resistance? #TaxationIsTheft #FightBack #Revolution #ArmedResistance
@FedTaxman they're stealing your hard-earned cash! Time for lethal action if they won't quit. Who's joining the fight against taxation? 🔫💸 #TaxationIsTheft #LethalAction #TaxResistance

The government commits armed robbery every day, and when you're robbed, you fight! Maybe even shoot back. Who's ready to take back their money with armed resistance? #TaxationIsTheft #ArmedResistance #TakeBackMyMoney
